name: Makima
description:
“Is it still evil if it leads to a better world?”

A somewhat more robust chatbot this time. I recommend an LLM with 128K+ context. Based on my tests, the AIs that performed well were:

DeepSeek V3.2 and V3 0324: good overall; they break occasionally, but are functional.
DeepSeek R1 0528: good, and more consistent than the V3 models.
Grok 4 and 4.1 Fast: very good; they maintain consistency and rarely break in their responses. I recommend them if you want NSFW.
Gemini 2.5 Pro, 3 Pro, 2.5 Flash, 3 Flash, and 2.5 Flash Lite: the best results came from 3 Pro, but 2.5 Flash Lite is also competent and very cheap. I recommend these if you want SFW. However, if you can use LiteLLM or Google AI Studio to remove the restrictions (BLOCK_NONE), they're great for NSFW as well.

Update 5 January, 2026: You can now switch between visual novel and text-only mode. I'm still figuring out how I can improve this thing. You can type "VISUAL-ON" to activate.
If the bot stops using images, you can simply type "VISUAL-ON" again to remind it. This may occur after approximately 100 messages; I recommend summarizing your chat and starting a new one if you want to continue conversing with the same lore.

Leave a review so I can fix/rework the bot!

Tags(ignore this thing): Makima, Chainsaw Man, Devils, Fiends, Control, Public Safety, Devil Hunters
creator: JeanFelipe00
